chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.168 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For order on office objection a/w reply at A 2.For hg of main case 3.For hg of CMA No.999/24 21.02.2025. Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani, advocate for appellant. Zahid Ayubi, respondent No. 3 is present and filed power of Mr.Amir Asher Azeem, advocate, which is taken on record. We have heard learned counsel for appellant and prima facie has not found any error in the impugned order. Faced with the same situation, learned counsel for appellant submits that he would be satisfied and not press this appeal if the learned single Judge is directed to decide his application under Order 39 Rule 4 CPC read with Section 151 CPC, filed for deletion of his property, which has, according to him, wrongly been made subject matter of the dispute between the parties. In view of above, this appeal is disposed of as not pressed. However, the learned single Judge is directed to decide aforesaid application, if pending, expeditiously after affording a proper opportunity of hearing to all concerned. This appeal is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
